title: India-Nepal Relations
summary: India and Nepal are actively engaged in diplomatic discussions to strengthen their bilateral ties across various sectors. These ongoing dialogues aim to foster greater cooperation in areas such as trade, infrastructure, and regional security.

title: India proposes new rules to regulate news and political posts on social media
summary: The Indian government has introduced new regulations aimed at overseeing news and political content shared on social media platforms. These proposed rules could extend government oversight to individual users who post on current affairs, raising concerns about freedom of expression.

summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has achieved a significant milestone, becoming India's longest-serving head of government. This tenure reflects a sustained period of leadership and policy implementation under his administration.

summary: Tensions between India and Pakistan continue to be a focal point of regional instability, with ongoing diplomatic and military challenges. The long-standing dispute over Kashmir and cross-border incidents remain key drivers of this complex relationship.
